requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety of Power Tools: Philippine PNS IEC 62841 and 230 V 60 Hz Mains Versus China GB/T 3883
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具电气安全：菲律宾PNS IEC 62841与230V 60Hz电网对比中国GB/T 3883
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具電氣安全：菲律賓PNS IEC 62841與230V 60Hz電網對比中國GB/T 3883

summary.en: The Philippines assesses electric power tool safety against PNS standards that adopt the IEC 62841 series (general requirements in IEC 62841-1, with the matching part-2 for the specific tool such as drills, grinders, or saws). Where the tool falls under a mandatory product certification scheme, the Bureau of Philippine Standards under DTI requires a PS licence for local manufacture or an Import Commodity Clearance for imports, supported by an accredited test report. Design must also suit the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz single-phase supply, which differs from China's 220 V or 380 V 50 Hz, so insulation, motor rating, double-insulation or earthing class, and plug type must be confirmed for local use.
summary.zh: 菲律宾依据采用IEC 62841系列的PNS标准评估电动工具安全（IEC 62841-1为通用要求，并配以对应钻、磨、锯等具体工具的第2部分）。若工具落入强制产品认证范围，DTI下属菲律宾标准局要求本地制造取得PS许可或进口取得进口商品清关，并需有认可机构的检测报告支持。设计还须适配菲律宾230V 60Hz单相供电，这与中国220V或380V 50Hz不同，故绝缘、电机额定值、双重绝缘或接地等级及插头形式均须按本地使用确认。
summary.zht: 菲律賓依據採用IEC 62841系列的PNS標準評估電動工具安全（IEC 62841-1為通用要求，並配以對應鑽、磨、鋸等具體工具的第2部分）。若工具落入強制產品認證範圍，DTI下屬菲律賓標準局要求本地製造取得PS許可或進口取得進口商品清關，並需有認可機構的檢測報告支持。設計還須適配菲律賓230V 60Hz單相供電，這與中國220V或380V 50Hz不同，故絕緣、電機額定值、雙重絕緣或接地等級及插頭形式均須按本地使用確認。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 62841-1 (general safety, electric motor-operated hand-held, transportable and lawn and garden tools)
Relevant PNS IEC 62841-2 part for the specific tool type
BPS PS licence or Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) under DTI where the tool is within mandatory scope
Philippine 230 V 60 Hz single-phase mains compatibility

summary.en: Chinese power tools are commonly built to GB/T 3883, the national adoption of the IEC 62841 series, with the general part and the tool-specific part. Many household and similar power tools also fall under China Compulsory Certification (CCC). These are strong technical references, but a Chinese CCC mark or GB/T test report does not by itself satisfy a Philippine PS or ICC requirement and is rated to a 220 V or 380 V 50 Hz supply rather than 230 V 60 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具通常按GB/T 3883制造，即IEC 62841系列的国家采标，含通用部分和工具专用部分。许多家用及类似电动工具还落入中国强制性产品认证（CCC）。这些是有力的技术参考，但中国CCC标志或GB/T检测报告本身并不满足菲律宾PS或ICC要求，且额定于220V或380V 50Hz而非230V 60Hz。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具通常按GB/T 3883製造，即IEC 62841系列的國家採標，含通用部分和工具專用部分。許多家用及類似電動工具還落入中國強制性產品認證（CCC）。這些是有力的技術參考，但中國CCC標誌或GB/T檢測報告本身並不滿足菲律賓PS或ICC要求，且額定於220V或380V 50Hz而非230V 60Hz。

standards_or_laws: Rated to China 220 V or 380 V 50 Hz supply

gap.en: The exporter should map each GB/T 3883 clause to the matching PNS IEC 62841 clause, then have an accredited laboratory issue a report acceptable to BPS and confirm whether the tool is in mandatory PS or ICC scope. Mains and plug differences should be checked because a 220 V 50 Hz unit may run on 230 V 60 Hz but motor speed, fan cooling, timing and any speed-control electronics can behave differently, and the Philippine flat-pin plug differs from common China plugs.
gap.zh: 出口商应将GB/T 3883的每个条款映射到对应的PNS IEC 62841条款，然后由认可实验室出具BPS可接受的报告，并确认工具是否落入强制PS或ICC范围。应核查电网和插头差异，因220V 50Hz机型虽可在230V 60Hz运行，但电机转速、风扇散热、定时及任何调速电子可能表现不同，且菲律宾扁脚插头与常见中国插头不同。
gap.zht: 出口商應將GB/T 3883的每個條款映射到對應的PNS IEC 62841條款，然後由認可實驗室出具BPS可接受的報告，並確認工具是否落入強制PS或ICC範圍。應核查電網和插頭差異，因220V 50Hz機型雖可在230V 60Hz運行，但電機轉速、風扇散熱、定時及任何調速電子可能表現不同，且菲律賓扁腳插頭與常見中國插頭不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the specific tool is listed under a Philippine product certification scheme (PS for local manufacture, ICC for imports) administered by BPS under DTI; otherwise voluntary to PNS but still subject to general consumer safety law
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 3883 is a recommended national standard; CCC is mandatory for products listed in the CCC catalogue

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards, Department of Trade and Industry (Philippines)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese GB/T 3883 report or CCC mark is a useful technical starting point for Philippine power tool entry but does not replace confirmation of BPS PS or ICC scope, a PNS IEC 62841 test report acceptable to BPS, or verification of 230 V 60 Hz and plug suitability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 3883报告或CCC标志是菲律宾电动工具准入的有用技术起点，但不替代BPS PS或ICC范围确认、BPS可接受的PNS IEC 62841检测报告，或230V 60Hz及插头适配性核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 3883報告或CCC標誌是菲律賓電動工具准入的有用技術起點，但不替代BPS PS或ICC範圍確認、BPS可接受的PNS IEC 62841檢測報告，或230V 60Hz及插頭適配性核驗。
